cute.mnemonics: Sounds like 'kawaii.' This is similar to the English word 'cawaii' for cute.

kind.mnemonics: Sounds like 'shin-sets.' Picture a kind person who always sets their heart (shin) on doing good.

convenient.mnemonics: Sounds like 'ben-ri.' Imagine Ben, who is always handy and convenient to have around.

to sing.mnemonics: Sounds like 'ooh-ta-oo.' Picture singing a song with 'ooh' sounds.

to put on a hat.mnemonics: Sounds like 'cab-ru.' Imagine putting on a hat before getting into a cab.

to put on items below your waist.mnemonics: Sounds like 'huck.' Think of 'hucking' on your pants or shoes.

to get to know.mnemonics: Sounds like 'sheer.' Picture getting to know something as clearly as seeing through sheer fabric.

I know.mnemonics: Sounds like 'sheet-tea-mass.' Imagine confidently saying 'I know' as you sip a cup of tea.

I do not know.mnemonics: Sounds like 'sheer-ma-sen.' Picture saying 'I don't know' with a sheer look of confusion.

to live.mnemonics: Sounds like 'sum.' Think of where you live as the sum of your home life.
